description: EDI parse, validate, send & inspect (X12/EDIFACT) from any MCP client. Demo without API key.
name: io.github.SignalEDI/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Workspace API key with the 'platform' scope (sk_live_…). Optional for demo mode; create one at https://signaledi.com/console/keys for send, transactions, and QuickBooks tools.
environmentVariables.name: SIGNALEDI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://signaledi.com; point at a preview deployment or custom domain when needed.
environmentVariables.name: SIGNALEDI_BASE_URL

title: SignalEDI
